calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Allowing Release Of Mental Health And Medical Records;
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
R. Wesley Pratt, Esq., for defendant and moving party: California Pacific Medical Center

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant California Pacific Medical Center's motion for order allowing release of records is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-30-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-16-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 502

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Demnad For Production And Inspection And Imposing Monetary Sanction,
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Emily Lemay's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is denied as defendant has responded that it has neither possession nor control of the requested documents. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-08-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-22-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 514

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
